Defendant Stoneledge Furniture Llc'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Transferring Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANT STONELEDGE FURNITURE LLC'S Motion For An Order Transferring Action.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as moot. The court transferred this action to San Mateo County on November 9, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
